# s007: placeholder branch creation on take-into-work (git-only demo). The
# per-command-timeout + scalar back-compat assertions moved to command_timeout.txt
# so they run without git (T6).
[!exec:git] skip

exec git init

exec mtt init
cp gated.yaml .mtt/config.yaml

exec mtt add 'implement feature'
stdout 'created t1'

# take into work: the tbd -> in_progress gate runs `git checkout -b task/{{.ID}}`.
exec mtt in_progress t1
stdout 't1: tbd → in_progress'

# On a fresh repo with no commits the branch is UNBORN, so `git branch --list`
# would be empty — assert the current branch instead.
exec git symbolic-ref --short HEAD
stdout 'task/t1'

-- gated.yaml --
version: 1
project:
  name: demo
command_timeout: 5m
types:
  - name: task
    prefix: t
    parents: []
    default: true
    statuses:
      - {name: tbd,         kind: initial}
      - {name: in_progress, kind: active}
      - {name: done,        kind: terminal}
      - {name: cancelled,   kind: terminal}
    transitions:
      - {from: tbd,         to: in_progress, commands: ["git checkout -b task/{{.ID}}"]}
      - {from: in_progress, to: done,        commands: [{run: "sleep 1", timeout: 100ms}]}
      - {from: in_progress, to: cancelled}
